requirement_topic.en: EMC Directive — Household Refrigerating Appliances (Directive 2014/30/EU + EN 55014 series)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容指令——家用制冷器具（指令2014/30/EU + EN 55014系列）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容指令——家用製冷器具（指令2014/30/EU + EN 55014系列）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the EU market must comply with EMC Directive 2014/30/EU. The primary harmonised emission standard for household appliances (including refrigerators) is EN 55014-1:2021 (Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission), and the immunity standard is EN 55014-2:2015 + A1:2020 (Part 2: Immunity — product family standard). EN 55014-1 covers conducted and radiated disturbance limits for appliances whose mains supply frequencies are between 0 Hz and 400 Hz, including brush-type motors, induction motors, and their associated switching electronics (relevant for modern inverter-driven compressors). Compliance establishes a presumption of conformity with the essential EMC requirements. Manufacturers self-declare conformity via an EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC) and compile a Technical File; no Notified Body involvement is required for EMC in most household appliance cases.
summary.zh: 投放欧盟市场的家用制冷器具须符合电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU。适用于家用器具（包括电冰箱）的主要协调发射标准为EN 55014-1:2021（电磁兼容——家用器具、电动工具及类似器具的要求——第1部分：发射），抗扰度标准为EN 55014-2:2015 + A1:2020（第2部分：抗扰度——产品族标准）。EN 55014-1涵盖了电网供电频率在0 Hz至400 Hz之间的器具（包括换向器电动机型、感应电动机型及其相关开关电子设备，与现代变频压缩机相关）的传导与辐射骚扰限值。符合上述协调标准可推定符合基本电磁兼容要求。制造商通过签署欧盟符合性声明（DoC）并编制技术文件进行自我声明；大多数家用器具的EMC合格评定无需公告机构参与。
summary.zht: 投放歐盟市場的家用製冷器具須符合電磁相容指令2014/30/EU。適用於家用器具（包括電冰箱）的主要協調發射標準為EN 55014-1:2021（電磁相容——家用器具、電動工具及類似器具的要求——第1部分：發射），抗擾度標準為EN 55014-2:2015 + A1:2020（第2部分：抗擾度——產品族標準）。EN 55014-1涵蓋了電網供電頻率在0 Hz至400 Hz之間的器具（包括換向器電動機型、感應電動機型及其相關開關電子設備，與現代變頻壓縮機相關）的傳導與輻射騷擾限值。符合上述協調標準可推定符合基本電磁相容要求。製造商通過簽署歐盟符合性聲明（DoC）並編製技術文件進行自我聲明；大多數家用器具的EMC合格評定無需公告機構參與。

standards_or_laws: EN 55014-1:2021 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (harmonised under EMC Directive 2014/30/EU)
EN 55014-2:2015 + A1:2020 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (harmonised under EMC Directive 2014/30/EU)
EN IEC 61000-3-2:2019 + A1:2021 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (≤ 16 A/phase input) — supplementary where applicable
EN IEC 61000-3-3:2013 + A2:2021 — Voltage fluctuations and flicker — supplementary where applicable

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances (including refrigerators) are primarily governed by GB 4343.1-2018 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (Part 2: Immunity — product family standard; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015). For harmonic emissions, GB 17625.1-2022 (mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020) applies. These standards are enforced under the CCC mandatory certification regime administered by SAMR/CNCA. Test reports generated by CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories against GB 4343.1 are not directly accepted as the basis for a CE DoC under EMC Directive 2014/30/EU.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具（包括电冰箱）的电磁兼容要求主要依据GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、电动工具和类似器具的电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射限值和测量方法；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗扰度——产品族标准；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）执行。谐波发射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（强制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）适用。上述标准在市场监管总局/认证认可监督管理委员会（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC强制认证制度下执行。CNAS认可的中国实验室依据GB 4343.1出具的检测报告，不被直接接受作为EMC指令2014/30/EU框架下CE符合性声明的依据。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具（包括電冰箱）的電磁相容要求主要依據GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、電動工具和類似器具的電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射限值和測量方法；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗擾度——產品族標準；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）執行。諧波發射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（強制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）適用。上述標準在市場監管總局/認證認可監督管理委員會（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC強制認證制度下執行。CNAS認可的中國實驗室依據GB 4343.1出具的檢測報告，不被直接接受作為EMC指令2014/30/EU框架下CE符合性聲明的依據。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Limits for harmonic current emissions ≤ 16 A/phase (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020)

gap.en: The technical content gap between GB 4343.1-2018 (based on CISPR 14-1:2016) and EN 55014-1:2021 (based on CISPR 14-1:2020) may be limited for many refrigerator types — the 2021 edition introduced updates for emerging technologies (particularly switched-mode power supplies and inverter drives relevant to modern variable-speed compressors). However, two procedural gaps remain regardless of technical alignment: (1) Re-issuance obligation — the EU DoC must cite EN-designated standards; tests must be conducted by an EU-accredited or ILAC MRA-accepted laboratory; CNAS reports cannot substitute without re-issuance. (2) Inverter compressor models — modern refrigerators with variable-speed inverter compressors may generate additional EMC phenomena not fully addressed in older GB 4343.1 editions; manufacturers should verify coverage of inverter-specific emission test configurations in their existing test data against EN 55014-1:2021 requirements before attempting test data re-use.
gap.zh: 对于大多数电冰箱类型而言，GB 4343.1-2018（基于CISPR 14-1:2016）与EN 55014-1:2021（基于CISPR 14-1:2020）之间的技术内容差距可能有限——2021版引入了针对新兴技术的更新（特别是与现代变频压缩机相关的开关电源和变频驱动器）。但无论技术是否对等，仍存在两项程序性差距：（1）重新签发义务——欧盟符合性声明须引用EN编号标准；检测须由EU认可或ILAC MRA接受的实验室完成；CNAS报告未经重新签发不能替代。（2）变频压缩机型号——装配变频压缩机的现代电冰箱可能产生旧版GB 4343.1未充分涵盖的附加电磁兼容现象；制造商在尝试复用现有检测数据前，应核实其数据是否涵盖EN 55014-1:2021对变频专项发射测试配置的要求。
gap.zht: 對於大多數電冰箱類型而言，GB 4343.1-2018（基於CISPR 14-1:2016）與EN 55014-1:2021（基於CISPR 14-1:2020）之間的技術內容差距可能有限——2021版引入了針對新興技術的更新（特別是與現代變頻壓縮機相關的開關電源和變頻驅動器）。但無論技術是否對等，仍存在兩項程序性差距：（1）重新簽發義務——歐盟符合性聲明須引用EN編號標準；檢測須由EU認可或ILAC MRA接受的實驗室完成；CNAS報告未經重新簽發不能替代。（2）變頻壓縮機型號——裝配變頻壓縮機的現代電冰箱可能產生舊版GB 4343.1未充分涵蓋的附加電磁相容現象；製造商在嘗試複用現有檢測數據前，應核實其數據是否涵蓋EN 55014-1:2021對變頻專項發射測試配置的要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for CE marking — essential requirements of Directive 2014/30/EU are legally binding; EN 55014-1:2021 and EN 55014-2:2015+A1:2020 are the harmonised product-family standards conferring presumption of conformity
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 is mandatory (GB) for CCC certification; GB/T 4343.2-2020 is recommended (GB/T); both enforced under CCC regime by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC Directive 2014/30/EU compliance is mandatory for EU market placement of household refrigerators. EN 55014-1:2021 (emission) and EN 55014-2 (immunity) are the applicable harmonised standards. Chinese CCC EMC test data (GB 4343.1-2018) cannot be directly used for a CE DoC; re-testing at an EU-recognised laboratory and re-issuance of the DoC are required. Inverter-compressor models warrant particular attention to ensure EN 55014-1:2021 test coverage.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU合规是家用电冰箱投放欧盟市场的强制要求。EN 55014-1:2021（发射）和EN 55014-2（抗扰度）为适用的协调标准。中国CCC电磁兼容检测数据（GB 4343.1-2018）不能直接用于CE符合性声明；须在EU认可实验室重新检测并重新签发符合性声明。变频压缩机型号尤须关注是否符合EN 55014-1:2021的检测覆盖要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】電磁相容指令2014/30/EU合規是家用電冰箱投放歐盟市場的強制要求。EN 55014-1:2021（發射）和EN 55014-2（抗擾度）為適用的協調標準。中國CCC電磁相容檢測數據（GB 4343.1-2018）不能直接用於CE符合性聲明；須在EU認可實驗室重新檢測並重新簽發符合性聲明。變頻壓縮機型號尤須關注是否符合EN 55014-1:2021的檢測覆蓋要求。
